classificationValues.covered-ruby-override: Ruby owns an override, compiler lowering, or runtime seam and the current test suite has direct evidence for this surface.
classificationValues.covered-upstream-fallback: The surface is covered by the Ruby lane while using upstream Haxe std source, possibly with lower-level Ruby-owned dependencies.
classificationValues.upstream-fallback-candidate: No Ruby override is indicated yet; promote only after a fixture or smoke proves upstream fallback works on Ruby.
classificationValues.ruby-override-needed: The surface needs or already has Ruby-owned lowering, runtime support, or std/ruby/_std replacement before parity can be claimed.
classificationValues.unsupported-target-specific: The fixture is not a Ruby runtime parity surface or is outside the current Ruby target contract.
